tech-accessories.name: Apple AIRPOD PRO 2ND GEN
tech-accessories.description: The Apple AIRPOD PRO 2ND GENare premium wireless earbuds featuring Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Transparency, and Personalized Spatial Audio for an immersive listening experience.
tech-accessories.fullDescription:
The Apple AIRPOD PRO 2ND GENare premium wireless earbuds featuring Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Transparency, and Personalized Spatial Audio for an immersive listening experience. Powered by the Apple H2 chip, they deliver high-fidelity sound with deep bass and crisp highs. The MagSafe Charging Case includes a built-in speaker and Precision Finding for easy tracking. With an IP54 rating, they are dust, sweat, and water-resistant, making them ideal for everyday use.
    Chipset: Apple H2 headphone chip Audio Technology: Custom high-excursion Apple driver, Adaptive EQ, Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking Noise Control: Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Transparency, Conversation Awareness Microphones: Dual beamforming microphones, inward-facing microphone
    Listening Time: Up to 6 hours on a single charge (5.5 hours with Spatial Audio enabled) Talk Time: Up to 4.5 hours on a single charge Charging Case Battery Life: Up to 30 hours of listening time Charging Options: MagSafe charger, Apple Watch charger, Qi-certified chargers, USB-C
    Bluetooth Version: 5.3 Water & Dust Resistance: IP54-rated (dust, sweat, and water-resistant) Controls: Touch control for playback, volume adjustment, and mode switching
    AirPods Pro: 30.9mm x 21.8mm x 24.0mm, 5.3g each Charging Case: 45.2mm x 60.6mm x 21.7mm, 50.8g

tech-accessories.name: Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-5AC-GEN2-EU
tech-accessories.description: The Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-5AC-GEN2-EU is a powerful and cost-effective outdoor wireless broadband solution, designed for long-distance connectivity in the 5 GHz frequency range.
tech-accessories.fullDescription:
The Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-5AC-GEN2-EU is a powerful and cost-effective outdoor wireless broadband solution, designed for long-distance connectivity in the 5 GHz frequency range. It features a high gain of 23 dBi, making it ideal for point-to-point and point-to-multi-point network setups. This device is part of Ubiquiti's airMAX ac series, delivering enhanced throughput of up to 450 Mbps and improved noise immunity. The Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-5AC-GEN2-EU incorporates an innovative lightweight, compact design with a high-gain directional antenna, ensuring reliable performance over distances of up to 30+ km. Its advanced mechanical design allows for quick assembly and precise alignment using a flexible ball joint mounting system. Built to withstand harsh outdoor environments, it is constructed with UV-resistant materials and operates within a temperature range of -40C to 70C. Combined with Ubiquitis airOS v8 software for better scalability and reduced latency, the Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-5AC-GEN2-EUis a dependable choice for creating high-performance wireless bridges or serving as a robust client device in an airMAX network.

Specification

    Frequency Range: 5150 5875 MHz Gain: 23 dBi Throughput: Up to 450 Mbps Antenna Design: High-gain directional antenna Power Supply: 24V, 0.3A PoE adapter (included) Operating Temperature: -40C to 70C Mounting: Pole mounting kit included Wi-Fi Management: Dedicated Wi-Fi radio for easy setup and management Compliance: FCC, IC, CE certifications
This device is designed for long-distance connectivity and is part of Ubiquiti's airMAX ac series, ensuring reliable performance and scalability.

tech-accessories.name: Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU
tech-accessories.description: The Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU is an advanced and cost-effective solution designed for outdoor wireless broadband connectivity.
tech-accessories.fullDescription:
The Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU is an advanced and cost-effective solution designed for outdoor wireless broadband connectivity. Operating in the 5 GHz frequency band, the Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU delivers exceptional performance with its 23 dBi gain, making it ideal for long-distance connections of up to 30+ km. Whether you're setting up a point-to-point link or creating a point-to-multi-point network, the Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU ensures reliable and efficient data transmission. This device incorporates InnerFeed technology, which combines the radio and antenna into a single, seamless unit for enhanced efficiency and reduced installation complexity. Its innovative design includes a lightweight, compact form factor and a flexible ball joint mounting system, simplifying alignment and setup. Built with durable, UV-resistant materials, the Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU is engineered to withstand harsh outdoor environments. Offering up to 100+ Mbps real-world throughput and leveraging Ubiquiti's airMAX technology for improved scalability and reduced latency, the Ubiquiti LiteBeam LBE-M5-23-EU is the perfect choice for anyone seeking high-performance wireless bridging at an affordable price. . Specifications
    Frequency Range: 5150 5875 MHz Gain: 23 dBi Dimensions: 362 x 267 x 184 mm Weight: 750 g Power Supply: 24V, 0.2A PoE adapter (included) Operating Temperature: -40C to 70C Mounting: Pole mounting kit included Compliance: FCC, IC, CE certifications

tech-accessories.name: Case Logic Professional Backpack 15.6
tech-accessories.description: The Case Logic Professional Backpack 15.6 is a premium choice for professionals who need a reliable, stylish, and functional backpack to carry their essentials.
tech-accessories.fullDescription:
The Case Logic Professional Backpack 15.6 is a premium choice for professionals who need a reliable, stylish, and functional backpack to carry their essentials. Designed with a sleek and modern aesthetic, this backpack is perfect for work, travel, and everyday use. Its streamlined structure and durable materials make it a versatile companion for those who are always on the move. Crafted from high-quality mlange fabric with copper touchpoints, the Case Logic Professional Backpack 15.6 offers exceptional durability and water resistance, ensuring your belongings are protected from daily wear and tear. The backpack features a dedicated padded compartment for laptops up to 15.6 inches, providing secure storage and protection against impacts. Additionally, it includes a separate compartment for tablets or iPads, making it ideal for professionals who rely on multiple devices. The spacious main compartment is thoughtfully designed to accommodate documents, chargers, and other accessories, while the organization panel keeps smaller items neatly arranged. A quick-access front pocket allows you to store essentials like keys, phones, or small electronics, ensuring they are always within reach. For added convenience during travel, the backpack is equipped with a luggage strap that easily attaches to rolling luggage, making airport navigation hassle-free. Comfort is a key feature of the Case Logic Professional Backpack 15.6. The padded back panel and shoulder straps are lined with breathable mesh, providing maximum comfort during extended use. The tapered body design and grab handles at the top and bottom make it easy to load the backpack into overhead bins or small spaces, enhancing its practicality for frequent travelers. Available in a sleek and professional design, this backpack is not only functional but also stylish, making it suitable for a variety of settings. Whether you're heading to the office, attending meetings, or traveling for business, the Case Logic Professional Backpack 15.6 ensures you can carry your essentials with ease and elegance.

Specifications

    Laptop Compatibility: Fits laptops up to 15.6 inches. Tablet Compatibility: Dedicated compartment for tablets or iPads. Material: Mlange fabric with copper touchpoints. Storage Features: Multiple compartments, including an organization panel and quick-access pocket. Comfort Features: Padded back panel and shoulder straps with breathable mesh. Additional Features: Luggage strap for travel convenience.

tech-accessories.name: Thule Lithos Backpack 16L
tech-accessories.description: The Thule Lithos Backpack 16L is a stylish, compact, and highly functional backpack designed to meet the needs of modern urban dwellers.
tech-accessories.fullDescription:
The Thule Lithos Backpack 16L is a stylish, compact, and highly functional backpack designed to meet the needs of modern urban dwellers. Perfect for students, daily commuters, and city explorers, this backpack offers an impeccable blend of sleek aesthetics, practicality, and durability. Crafted with a contemporary design, it seamlessly combines form and function, making it an ideal choice for those who value both style and organization. With a volume of 16 liters, this backpack provides ample space for your everyday essentials without being bulky. It features a padded, elevated compartment designed to protect laptops up to 14" or a 16" MacBook, safeguarding your device from bumps and impacts. Additionally, a dedicated slip pocket secures tablets up to 10.5", ensuring all your devices are safe and easily accessible. The interior of the backpack is well-organized, boasting a zippered mesh pocket for smaller accessories like chargers, cables, and keys. This thoughtful design helps you stay efficient and clutter-free throughout your day. The Thule Lithos Backpack 16L also includes practical external storage options. An exterior stash pocket allows for quick access to essentials such as your phone, wallet, or sunglasses, while a convenient side pocket is perfect for your water bottle or umbrella. For added versatility, lash points on the front panel enable you to attach extra gear, making the backpack adaptable for various activities and outings. Comfort is at the forefront of this design, with a padded back panel and shoulder straps that ensure ease of carrying, even during long periods. The strap management system keeps excess straps neatly secured, providing a clean and hassle-free experience. Constructed from durable polyester, this backpack is built to withstand daily wear and tear. Rigorously tested at the Thule Test Center, it guarantees reliability and long-lasting performance. Available in a variety of colors, the Thule Lithos Backpack 16L caters to diverse style preferences, from timeless neutrals to vibrant shades. Its modern aesthetic makes it suitable for various settings, whether youre heading to work, attending classes, or exploring the city. Plus, its crafted with eco-conscious materials, allowing you to make a sustainable choice without compromising on quality. Designed for life on the move, the Thule Lithos Backpack 16L is the ultimate everyday companion. Combining sleek design, innovative storage solutions, and unbeatable comfort, it ensures that youre always ready for whatever the day brings.

tech-accessories.name: Excel Cat6 RJ45 Euro

tech-accessories.fullDescription:
The Excel Cat6 RJ45 Euro is a high-performance networking component designed for reliable Ethernet connectivity. Part of the Euro system, the Excel Cat6 (UTP) Unscreened RJ45 Euro is engineered for flexibility, making it suitable for structured cabling solutions in both commercial and residential setups. The Excel Cat6 RJ45 Euro adheres to Category 6 (Cat6) standards, providing fast data transmission speeds of up to 1 Gbps while minimizing crosstalk and ensuring high performance. It is equipped with an RJ45 interface, widely used in Ethernet networks, making it ideal for devices like computers, printers, and switches. This Unshielded Twisted Pair (UTP) module offers cost-effective installation and integrates seamlessly into standard faceplates and back boxes. It combines a professional design with dependable connectivity, making it a trusted choice for high-performing networks. Let me know if you'd like further adjustments or additional information! The Excel Cat6 RJ45 Euro is a high-performance networking component that supports up to 1 Gbps data transmission speeds in compliance with Cat6 standards. It features an RJ45 interface, which is widely used for Ethernet connections, and its UTP design makes it cost-effective and easy to install. The Euro format ensures compatibility with standard faceplates and back boxes, providing a clean and professional setup. Engineered to meet industry standards, this device is ideal for offices, schools, data centers, and home networks requiring reliable Ethernet connectivity.

    Category: Cat6, supporting data transmission speeds up to 1 Gbps. Type: UTP (Unshielded Twisted Pair), ensuring cost-effective and straightforward installation. Connector: RJ45, a standard interface for Ethernet connections. Design: Euro module style, compatible with standard faceplates and back boxes. Color: White, offering a clean and professional appearance. Applications: Suitable for offices, data centers, schools, and residential setups. Compliance: Meets or exceeds industry standards for reliable performance.

tech-accessories.fullDescription:
The HIKVISION FACE ACCESS TERMINAL-DS-K1T342MFX-E1 is designed to provide robust access control and identification solutions with cutting-edge technologies. It supports a face recognition capacity of 1,500 faces, ensuring high accuracy (over 99%) and quick recognition within 0.2 seconds. It supports two-way audio communication, enhances security with time synchronization, and offers audio prompts. These features collectively make it a reliable and advanced solution for modern access control systems.

tech-accessories.name: Ubiquity NSM5 Nano Station M5
tech-accessories.description: The Ubiquity NSM5 Nano Station M5 is a compact and versatile outdoor wireless bridge/base station designed for high-performance connectivity.
tech-accessories.fullDescription:
The Ubiquity NSM5 Nano Station M5 is a compact and versatile outdoor wireless bridge/base station designed for high-performance connectivity. Operating on the 5 GHz frequency band, it delivers reliable point-to-point and point-to-multipoint wireless communication with a real outdoor throughput of over 150 Mbps and a range of up to 15+ km. The NSM5 features a 16 dBi dual-polarity antenna with optimized cross-polarity isolation, ensuring efficient and stable data transmission. It utilizes Ubiquiti's airMAX technology, which employs a Time Division Multiple Access (TDMA) protocol to enhance network performance by reducing latency and improving scalability. This device is equipped with two 10/100 Mbps Ethernet ports, one of which supports PoE passthrough, making it easy to integrate into existing network setups. Its durable design, made from outdoor UV-stabilized plastic, ensures reliable operation in harsh environments, withstanding temperatures from -30C to 75C and humidity levels of 5% to 95%. The Ubiquity NSM5 Nano Station M5 is ideal for applications such as extending network coverage, connecting remote locations, or providing internet access in challenging outdoor environments. Its sleek design, ease of installation, and robust performance make it a popular choice for both residential and commercial use.
    Processor: Atheros MIPS 24KC, 400 MHz. Memory: 32 MB SDRAM, 8 MB Flash. Power Supply: Passive PoE (24V, 0.5A adapter included). Power Consumption: Maximum of 8W. Operating Temperature: -30C to 75C (-22F to 167F). Humidity: 5% to 95% (non-condensing). Dimensions: 294 x 31 x 80 mm (11.6 x 1.3 x 3.2 inches). Weight: 400 g (14.1 oz). Durability: Built with outdoor UV-stabilized plastic and supports pole mounting.

tech-accessories.name: samsung galaxy buds 2 bora purple
tech-accessories.description: The Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro in Bora Purple are premium true wireless earbuds designed to deliver an immersive and high-fidelity audio experience.
tech-accessories.fullDescription:
The Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro in Bora Purple are premium true wireless earbuds designed to deliver an immersive and high-fidelity audio experience. Featuring a compact and ergonomic design, they provide a comfortable fit for extended listening sessions.?

Key Features:

  • 24-bit Hi-Fi Audio: Experience rich and detailed sound quality with 24-bit high-fidelity audio support, ensuring a premium listening experience. ?

  • Intelligent Active Noise Cancellation (ANC): Equipped with three high Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) microphones, the Galaxy Buds2 Pro effectively track and eliminate external noise, including subtle sounds like wind, allowing you to focus on your audio without distractions. ?

  • Voice Detect: This feature automatically switches from ANC to Ambient Sound mode when you start speaking, enabling clear conversations without the need to remove your earbuds. ?

tech-accessories.name: CAT6 NETWORK CABLE
tech-accessories.description: A Cat6 network cable is a standardized twisted-pair cable used for Ethernet and other network applications.
tech-accessories.fullDescription:
A Cat6 network cable is a standardized twisted-pair cable used for Ethernet and other network applications. It offers higher performance than Cat 5e cables, supporting speeds of up to 10 Gbps at a frequency of 250 MHz.

Key Features of Cat 6 Cable
    Speed: Supports 10 Gbps over distances up to 55 meters; for longer distances, speeds may be lower.
  • Bandwidth: Operates at 250 MHz, reducing interference and improving data transmission.
  • Backward Compatibility: Works with Cat 5e and Cat 3 standards.
  • Shielding: Available in shielded (STP) and unshielded (UTP) versions to minimize crosstalk.
  • Connectors: Typically terminated with RJ45 connectors, using either T568A or T568B wiring standards.
  • Use Cases: Ideal for home networks, office setups, and data centers requiring reliable high-speed connections.

It's crafted from premium materials for durability, and features an elegant black matte finish with a subtle LED ring for easy port access in the dark.

printers-scanners.name: HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW
printers-scanners.description: The HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW is a high-performance monochrome laser printer designed for small to medium-sized businesses.
printers-scanners.fullDescription:
The HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW is a high-performance monochrome laser printer designed for small to medium-sized businesses. With a print speed of up to 40 pages per minute (ppm) and automatic duplex printing, it ensures fast and efficient output. The HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW delivers sharp and professional-quality prints with a resolution of 1200 x 1200 dpi. It features built-in Wi-Fi, Ethernet, and USB connectivity, offering seamless integration into office networks and mobile printing via HP Smart App. Compact and ENERGY STAR certified, the HP LaserJet Pro 4003dw is an eco-friendly choice for reliable and cost-effective printing. Specifications
    Print Technology: Laser Resolution: Up to 1200 x 1200 dpi Print Speed: Up to 40 ppm (black) Connectivity: USB 2.0, Ethernet, Wi-Fi Paper Handling: Automatic duplex printing, 250-sheet input tray Monthly Duty Cycle: Up to 80,000 pages Eco-Friendly: ENERGY STAR certified
WHY HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW? The HP LaserJet Pro 4003dw is perfect for businesses seeking a reliable and efficient monochrome printer. Its fast print speed, automatic duplex printing, and high monthly duty cycle make it ideal for high-volume tasks. With professional-quality output and eco-friendly features, it ensures cost-effective and sustainable performance. Its versatile connectivity options and compact design make it a valuable addition to any office setup.

computing-devices.name: Lenovo ThinkPad L14
computing-devices.description: The Lenovo ThinkPad L14 is a reliable business laptop powered by Intel Core Ultra 5 or 7 processors with AI acceleration, featuring a 14-inch WUXGA IPS display, up to 64GB DDR5 RAM, and up to 2TB PCIe SSD for fast, efficient performance.  It offers modern connectivity with Wi-Fi 6E, Thunderbolt 4, Ethernet, and optional LTE/5G, enhanced security features, a 5MP IR camera, Dolby Atmos audio, and runs Windows 11 Pro.
computing-devices.fullDescription:
The Lenovo ThinkPad L14 is a reliable and efficient business laptop designed for professionals who need performance and durability. Powered by the latest Intel Core i7-1355U processor and featuring Intel Iris Xe Graphics, this laptop delivers smooth multitasking and impressive visuals. The 14-inch Full HD display ensures clear and vibrant images, while the robust build quality ensures it can withstand the rigors of daily use. With 16 GB of DDR4 RAM and a 512 GB SSD, the ThinkPad L14 provides fast data access and ample storage for all your needs. Enhanced security features, including a fingerprint reader and a physical webcam privacy shutter, ensure your data remains protected. The Lenovo ThinkPad L14 is perfect for business professionals who need a dependable and powerful laptop for their daily tasks. Specifications
    Processor: Intel Core i7-1355U (up to 5.0 GHz with Intel Turbo Boost Technology, 12 MB cache, 10 cores) Graphics: Intel Iris Xe Graphics Display: 14-inch Full HD (1920 x 1080 pixels) Memory: 16 GB DDR4 RAM Storage: 512 GB SSD Operating System: Windows 11 Pro Connectivity: Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) Weight: 1.61 kg (3.55 lbs) Dimensions: 329 mm x 227 mm x 20.4 mm (12.95" x 8.94" x 0.80") Security: Physical webcam privacy shutter, fingerprint reader Battery Life: Up to 12 hours
The Lenovo ThinkPad L14 is designed to meet the demands of business professionals, offering a perfect balance of performance, security, and durability.

The Dell Precision 7920 XCTO Base is a high-performance workstation designed for demanding professional applications, including AI, VR, and complex simulations. Powered by Intel Xeon Scalable processors, it offers exceptional computing power, expandable memory up to 3TB, and advanced graphics support for intensive workloads. With up to 136TB of storage, dual CPUs, and NVMe SSD options, the Dell Precision 7920 XCTO Base ensures maximum scalability and reliability. Its innovative chassis design includes integrated handles for easy deployment, while Dell Precision Optimizer enhances performance for ISV-certified applications. Whether for engineering, 3D rendering, or data analysis, the Dell Precision 7920 XCTO Base delivers unmatched power and efficiency. Performance & Processing
    Intel Xeon Scalable Processors with up to 28 cores per CPU Dual CPU support for maximum computing power Up to 3TB of DDR4 ECC memory for handling large datasets Dell Precision Optimizer for automatic performance tuning

ups.name: APC Back-UPS 500VA
ups.description: The APC Back-UPS 500VAis an ideal power backup solution for safeguarding essential electronics in homes and small office setups.
ups.fullDescription:
The APC Back-UPS 500VAis an ideal power backup solution for safeguarding essential electronics in homes and small office setups. Designed with reliability and efficiency in mind, this uninterruptible power supply provides seamless protection against power outages, surges, and fluctuations, ensuring uninterrupted performance for connected devices such as computers, routers, modems, and gaming consoles. With its 300W power capacity, the Back-UPS 500VA supports multiple devices simultaneously, making it suitable for a variety of scenarios. Its three battery-backed outlets ensure that critical devices remain operational during power interruptions, while the three surge-protected outlets prevent damage to less essential equipment. Additionally, it comes equipped with audible alarms that notify users of changes in power conditions, giving you peace of mind during unexpected disruptions. The integrated PowerChute software enhances its functionality by allowing automated system shutdowns, protecting sensitive data and minimizing hardware risks during extended outages. This APC Back-UPS 500VA also features a compact and lightweight tower design, allowing for easy installation in any space-constrained area. The lead-acid battery is both efficient and quick to recharge, ensuring readiness for the next power event. In terms of eco-friendliness, the APC Back-UPS 500VA adheres to energy efficiency standards and provides an environmentally conscious solution for power protection. Its durable build quality and user-friendly operation make it a trustworthy choice for protecting your valuable equipment and ensuring smooth operation during unpredictable power situations. Specifications
    Power Capacity: 500VA / 300W. Outlets: 6 total outlets (3 with battery backup and surge protection, 3 with surge protection only). Battery Type: Lead-acid battery with a typical recharge time of 8 hours. Runtime: Provides backup power for a few minutes, depending on the load. Surge Protection: 480 Joules surge energy rating. Input Voltage: 120V. Output Voltage: 120V. Additional Features:
      Audible alarms for power status. PowerChute software for automatic shutdown. Compact tower design for easy placement.
    Dimensions: Approximately 18.5 cm (H) x 11.5 cm (W) x 21.3 cm (D). Weight: Around 4.9 kg. Warranty: 2 years.

Its compact design and user-friendly features make it an excellent choice for small setups. Specifications

ups.name: Liebert PSI 750VA (675W)
ups.description: The Liebert PSI 750VA (675W)is a versatile and feature-rich uninterruptible power supply (UPS) designed for critical applications in IT environments, small data centers, and network closets.
ups.fullDescription:
The Liebert PSI 750VA (675W)is a versatile and feature-rich uninterruptible power supply (UPS) designed for critical applications in IT environments, small data centers, and network closets. Here's a detailed overview: The Liebert PSI 750VA (675W) is a line-interactive UPS that provides reliable power backup and protection against power disturbances such as outages, surges, and voltage fluctuations. With its 0.9 power factor, it delivers more usable power to connected devices, making it ideal for modern IT equipment. The Liebert PSI 750VA (675W) is designed to be flexible, with a rack/tower convertible form factor and a rotatable LCD display for easy monitoring in any setup. This Liebert PSI 750VA (675W) features automatic voltage regulation (AVR), which ensures stable output voltage without using the battery, thereby extending battery life. It also supports hot-swappable batteries, allowing for easy maintenance without interrupting power to connected devices. The Liebert PSI 750VA (675W) is equipped with multiple communication options, including USB and SNMP, for remote monitoring and management. Specifications
    Capacity: 750VA / 675W. Power Factor: 0.9. Input Voltage: 230V. Output Voltage: 230V. Waveform Type: Pure sine wave. Transfer Time: 46 ms. Outlets: 89 battery-backed outlets (depending on the model). Battery Type: Sealed lead-acid, maintenance-free. Runtime: 35 minutes at full load. Form Factor: Rack/tower convertible, 2U height. Communication Ports: USB, SNMP, contact closure. Operating Temperature: 040C. Warranty: 2 years.

ups.name: FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER
ups.description: The FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER is a cutting-edge energy solution that brings together the functionality of an inverter, solar charge controller, and battery charger in one efficient device.
ups.fullDescription:
The FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER is a cutting-edge energy solution that brings together the functionality of an inverter, solar charge controller, and battery charger in one efficient device. Designed for residential, commercial, and small-scale industrial applications, this hybrid inverter is an all-in-one energy manager, perfect for powering homes, offices, and businesses. Featuring a pure sine wave output, the inverter provides clean and stable power, making it safe for sensitive electronics such as computers, televisions, and medical devices. At its core is a highly efficient MPPT (Maximum Power Point Tracking) solar charge controller, which optimizes energy capture from solar panels, ensuring maximum energy utilization. Its wide MPPT voltage range of 120-450V DC makes it highly adaptable, accommodating various solar panel setups. With a high operational efficiency of up to 95%, the FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER delivers reliable performance while minimizing energy wastage. It includes advanced protection features such as overload, short circuit, over-temperature, and low battery safeguards, ensuring durability and dependability in demanding conditions. The FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER supports a high charging current of up to 100A, enabling fast and efficient battery charging. The intuitive LCD display provides real-time monitoring, showing crucial system metrics such as input and output voltage, battery level, and system status. This allows users to configure and optimize settings based on their specific energy requirements. Compatible with both lithium-ion and lead-acid batteries, this hybrid inverter offers flexibility for users to design a system that best meets their energy needs. Compact and lightweight, it is designed for easy installation and integration into existing solar energy setups or backup power systems. Whether the goal is to reduce electricity costs, achieve energy independence, or enhance sustainability, the FELICITY 3kVA /24V HYBRID INVERTER is a dependable and innovative choice.
Specifications

Solar Charger: Built-in MPPT (Maximum Power Point Tracking) solar charge controller with a voltage range of 120-450V DC. Efficiency: Up to 95%. Charging Current: Up to 100A. The UPS 3S 20kVA 400V 3:3 is a three-phase uninterruptible power supply designed to provide reliable and consistent power for small and medium-sized businesses. It delivers 20 kVA (20 kW) of power with an output voltage of 400V, and it is also compatible with 380V and 415V. This UPS uses double-conversion online technology to ensure clean and stable power, even during fluctuations and disturbances. It features high energy efficiency with less than 3% harmonic distortion, reducing operational costs while maintaining optimal performance. It is compatible with external battery systems, allowing for customizable runtime extensions based on specific needs. The UPS 3S 20kVA 400V 3:3 is built to withstand harsh environments, with dust filters and conformance-coated boards providing added protection. It is designed for quick setup and easy maintenance, with a compact structure that simplifies installation. The UPS 3S 20kVA 400V 3:3 is especially suitable for small-to-medium-sized data centers, electrical rooms, and environments requiring uninterrupted power supply to protect critical equipment. Its adaptability and user-friendly design make it a dependable solution for business continuity.

mobile-phones.name: Realme Note 50 3gb+64gb Midnight black
mobile-phones.description: This Realme Note 50 3gb+64gb Midnight black is designed with simplicity and practicality in mind.
mobile-phones.fullDescription:
This Realme Note 50 3gb+64gb Midnight black is designed with simplicity and practicality in mind. The Midnight Black finish gives it a sleek, understated look that feels modern without being flashy. Its 8mm ultra-slim body and lightweight 186g build make it comfortable to hold, even for long periods. The glass front paired with a plastic frame and back keeps it durable yet affordable. The 6.74-inch display isnt just bigits immersive. With a 90Hz refresh rate and 560 nits peak brightness, its surprisingly smooth and bright for a budget device. Whether you're scrolling through social media or watching videos, it feels responsive and vibrant. Under the hood, the Unisoc T612 processor handles everyday tasks like messaging, browsing, and light gaming with ease. And while 3GB RAM might sound modest, Realmes software optimization with Realme UI T on Android 13 keeps things running smoothly. The 13MP rear camera is enhanced with AI features like HDR, Night Mode, and Panorama, while the 5MP front camera supports beauty filters and portrait effectsgreat for casual selfies and video calls.
    Display: 6.74" IPS LCD, 90Hz, 720 x 1600 Processor: Unisoc T612, Octa-core OS: Android 13, Realme UI T RAM/Storage: 3GB + 64GB (expandable via microSD) Rear Camera: 13MP + 0.08MP Front Camera: 5MP Battery: 5000mAh, 10W charging Build: 8mm slim, 186g, IP54 rated Security: Side-mounted fingerprint Ports: USB-C, 3.5mm headphone jack

mobile-phones.name: Realme note 50 3gb+64gb sky blue
mobile-phones.description: The Realme note 50 3gb+64gb sky blueisnt just a budget phoneits a statement piece wrapped in a cool, refreshing hue that stands out from the crowd.
mobile-phones.fullDescription:
The Realme note 50 3gb+64gb sky blueisnt just a budget phoneits a statement piece wrapped in a cool, refreshing hue that stands out from the crowd. The color gives it a youthful, energetic vibe, while the slim 7.99mm body and 186g weight make it feel light and comfortable in hand. The front is dominated by a 6.74-inch 90Hz display, which feels surprisingly smooth for a phone in this price range. Whether you're scrolling through TikTok, reading messages, or watching YouTube, the visuals are crisp and fluid. The Sky Blue finish on the back has a subtle shimmer that catches the light, giving it a premium look without the premium price. Its also built to lastwith IP54 splash resistance, a sturdy plastic frame, and a glass front. Inside, the Unisoc T612 processor and 3GB RAM handle daily tasks like messaging, browsing, and light gaming with ease. And with 64GB of storage (expandable up to 2TB), youve got room for all your apps, photos, and music. The cameras are simple but effective: a 13MP rear shooter with AI enhancements like Night Mode and HDR, and a 5MP selfie cam thats great for video calls and casual snaps. And the 5000mAh battery? Its a marathon runnereasily lasting a full day or more.
    Display: 6.74" IPS LCD, 720 x 1600, 90Hz refresh rate Processor: Unisoc T612, Octa-core OS: Android 13 with Realme UI T Memory: 3GB RAM + 64GB storage (expandable via microSD) Rear Camera: 13MP + 0.08MP with HDR, Night Mode, Panorama Front Camera: 5MP with Beauty Mode, Portrait, HDR Battery: 5000mAh, 10W charging via USB-C Build: 7.99mm slim, 186g, IP54 splash-resistant Extras: Side fingerprint sensor, dual SIM, 3.5mm headphone jack
